mapper.sql:
p.STATUS_CD = 'NORMAL'
AND p.CATEGORY_ID IN ( SELECT CATEGORY_ID FROM TB_PRODUCT_CATEGORY START WITH CATEGORY_ID = #{categoryId} CONNECT BY PRIOR CATEGORY_ID = PARENT_ID )
AND (UPPER(p.PRODUCT_NAME) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(p.BRAND_NAME) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%')
mapper.select:
SELECT p.PRODUCT_ID, p.PRODUCT_CD, p.PRODUCT_NAME, p.BRAND_NAME, p.CATEGORY_ID, c.CATEGORY_NAME, TO_NUMBER(p.PRICE) AS PRICE, TO_NUMBER(p.SALE_PRICE) AS SALE_PRICE, TO_NUMBER(p.STOCK_QTY) AS STOCK_QTY, p.DESCRIPTION AS THUMBNAIL_URL, NVL(rv.AVG_RATING, 0) AS AVG_RATING, NVL(rv.REVIEW_COUNT, 0) AS REVIEW_COUNT FROM TB_PRODUCT p JOIN TB_PRODUCT_CATEGORY c ON c.CATEGORY_ID = p.CATEGORY_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TARGET_ID, ROUND(AVG(RATING), 1) AS AVG_RATING, COUNT(REVIEW_ID) AS REVIEW_COUNT FROM TB_REVIEW WHERE REVIEW_TYPE = 'PRODUCT' GROUP BY TARGET_ID ) rv ON rv.TARGET_ID = p.PRODUCT_ID WHERE
ORDER BY p.PRODUCT_ID DESC ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(p.SALE_PRICE) ASC ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(p.SALE_PRICE) DESC ORDER BY p.PRODUCT_ID ASC
OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_PRODUCT p WHERE
SELECT CATEGORY_ID, PARENT_ID, CATEGORY_NAME, DEPTH FROM TB_PRODUCT_CATEGORY WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY CATEGORY_ID
